# Controls

Mappings extracted from `config/keybinds.py`.

## Element Selection (Dual-Hand)

| Key | Element | Hand |
|-----|---------|------|
| ; | shadow | Right |
| E | water | Right |
| F | earth | Right |
| O | arcane | Right |
| P | light | Right |
| Q | fire | Right |
| R | ice | Right |
| U | nature | Right |

## Movement (WASD — Left Hand)

| Key | Direction |
|-----|-----------|
| A | left |
| D | right |
| S | down |
| W | up |

## Aiming (IJKL — Right Hand)

| Key | Direction |
|-----|-----------|
| I | up |
| J | left |
| K | down |
| L | right |

## Actions

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| BACKSPACE | Remove last element |
| ESCAPE | Clear queue / Quit (double-press) |
| G | Jump |
| LSHIFT | Self-cast modifier (Shift + Space) |
| SPACE | Cast spell (aimed) |
